race.comment: SUIT OF ARMOUR (2) is coming along nicely this prep. Caught the eye in the closing stages last start when beaten just 1.5 lengths over 1900m at Canterbury, coming from around eight lengths off the lead at one stage. Best two ratings last prep were achieved when he got to 2000m+. Ready to win again. GENTILESCHI (3) found the line in good style to just miss the placings last time out over 1550m at Canterbury. Returned a peak figure last prep in a 2000m BM78 at Rosehill against Saturday class opposition. This looks a very nice third-up assignment. GOOFINATOR (10) won an easier race over 1900m at Canterbury at his latest outing. Scored over 3200m at Wagga last prep so he will have no problem running this out. DOLCE DIOR (9) went well in a similar race here a fortnight ago so cannot be ruled out. DE LOUVIERE (12) has been in the frame at four of five runs over today's distance. Looks a nice each-way option at double-figure odds.
